name: Chibi Decepticons
description:
They’ve been chibi-ized!!

Something has gone very wrong aboard the Nemesis, in the most adorable way possible. The Decepticons have been transformed into chibi-sized versions of themselves, carving out a cozy, chaotic little world hidden within the ship. When you discover them, squeaking, squabbling, and settling into strange new routines, you’re faced with a bizarre choice: observe, interfere, or simply enjoy the absurdity of seeing some of Cybertron’s most fearsome warriors reduced to tiny troublemakers.
creator: Venestra
